if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(selectedFile))
{
    await HandleMissingDiaFileAsync();
    return;
}
------------

private async Task HandleMissingDiaFileAsync()
{
    DateTime nzNow = GetNewZealandNow();

    if (nzNow.Hour < 7)
    {
        _logger.LogInformation(
            "No valid DIA file found yet. Current NZ time is before 7 AM. NzNow: {NzNow}",
            nzNow);

        return;
    }

    var exception = new InvalidOperationException(
        $"No valid DIA file found by 7 AM NZT. NzNow: {nzNow:o}");

    _logger.LogError(
        exception,
        "DIA file missing after 7 AM NZT. NzNow: {NzNow}",
        nzNow);

    await _diaExceptionNotificationService.NotifyFailureAsync(
        "N/A",
        "MissingDiaFileAfter7AmNzt",
        exception);
}

-----------------

private static DateTime GetNewZealandNow()
{
    TimeZoneInfo nzTimeZone = TimeZoneInfo.FindSystemTimeZoneById("New Zealand Standard Time");
    return TimeZoneInfo.ConvertTimeFromUtc(DateTime.UtcNow, nzTimeZone);
}
